description: Enrichment Extended — State licensing, job posting intelligence, guild compensation benchmarks

tasks.title: State Licensing Enrichment
tasks.prompt:
Extend the Enrichment Service with State Licensing data (M7.6).

1. Create fixture data simulating state dental board records (license number, status, issue date, credential type) for 50 providers in src/Snapp.Service.Enrichment/Fixtures/licensing/
2. Implement a StateLicensingLoader that:
   - Reads fixture JSON
   - Fuzzy matches to NPI registry records (name + city matching) using the IDataProvider pattern from Sprint 8
   - Stores as SIGNAL# items in snapp-intel with confidence scores (exact name+city match = 0.9, partial = 0.6)
3. Feed career stage classifier with license issue dates (update STAGE# computation to incorporate license tenure)
4. Integration tests: load fixtures, verify SIGNAL# items created, verify confidence scores, verify career stage incorporates license data.
tasks.done_when: State licensing fixtures loaded. Signals stored with confidence scores. Career stage uses license data. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Job Posting Intelligence Enrichment
tasks.prompt:
Extend the Enrichment Service with Job Posting Intelligence (M7.7).

1. Create fixture data simulating Indeed/specialty board job postings for 20 practices in src/Snapp.Service.Enrichment/Fixtures/jobpostings/ (role, posting date, duration, urgency language, compensation signals)
2. Implement a JobPostingLoader that:
   - Reads fixture JSON
   - Extracts signals: posting frequency, role repetition (same role posted 3x in 2 years = chronic turnover signal), urgency language detection
   - Stores as SIGNAL# items in snapp-intel
   - Uses the IDataProvider pattern from Sprint 8
3. Feed workforce pressure scoring in the intelligence service (update scoring engine to incorporate job posting signals)
4. Integration tests: load fixtures, verify SIGNAL# items created, verify turnover signal detection, verify workforce scoring incorporates new signals.
tasks.done_when: Job posting fixtures loaded. Turnover and urgency signals detected. Workforce scoring uses job posting data. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Guild Compensation Benchmarking
tasks.prompt:
Implement Guild-Generated Compensation Benchmarks (M7.8) as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-7.2.

Extend the Intelligence Service with compensation-specific contribution and benchmarking:

1. New contribution category: StaffCompensation
   - Role (from vertical config role definitions)
   - Compensation type (hourly/salary/dailyRate)
   - Amount band (not exact — e.g., $30-35/hr, $35-40/hr)
   - Benefits included (boolean flags)

2. Compensation benchmark computation:
   - Aggregate anonymously by role × market × practice size
   - Compute P25/P50/P75 per role per cohort
   - Store as COHORT# METRIC#COMP#{role} items
   - Anonymity threshold: ≥5 contributors

3. Compensation intelligence output:
   - 'Practices in your market with your revenue profile pay [role] between $X and $Y'

4. Add compensation section to the benchmarking UI (extend /intelligence/benchmark page with a 'Compensation' MudTab)

Integration tests: 5+ users contribute compensation data, verify benchmarks computed, verify anonymity threshold, verify formatted output.
tasks.done_when: Compensation contribution and benchmarking works. Anonymized peer benchmarks. UI shows compensation tab. Tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 14 integration validation
tasks.prompt: Validate Sprint 14. Run all tests. Verify enriched intelligence includes licensing and job posting signals. Verify compensation benchmarks display. Write .claude/reports/sprint-14-validation.md.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Extended enrichment and compensation benchmarks work. Validation report written.
